race.description: Ladbrokes Big Bets Copy Now Hcp (Bm60)
race.comment: ARDUOUS (6) finished 4 lengths from the winner in eighth over 1666m at Ipswich last start after being in contention on the turn, a less impressive effort than her fifth at Sunshine Coast the run before. Has the ability to take care of this field. BEST COFFEE (1) missed the placings two runs back then didn't feature last start when 7 lengths away in seventh over 1600m at Doomben. Faces an easier assignment so he is a major player. MIDNIGHT MIRACLE (9) made progress last time out, finishing 4.5 lengths from the winner in second at the end of 1200m at Nanango. Taking on a better line-up this time but she cannot be overlooked. KIND WISH (3) turned in a nice run last time to finish third over 1350m at Ipswich. Likely improver so plenty to like about her chances.
